title: Agadam Bagadam Lyrics Aadhi Bhagavan Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Agadam Bagadam
Singers: Mohit Chauhan,
Movie: Aadhi Bhagavan
Music: Yuvan
Lyrics : Manoj
Full lyrics in this page - coming very soon ... keep you eye here.

Agadam bagadama jeena
kya aathu sathu kaaye ji

padupadu kadupadu jeena
uyi udutharu hoon un uduke jeena

meinha sastha sodha
tho chuthaa kardhe kaam

paagal pe paai jaamaake
mein chaanuse rose laagaavoonga

ho na jo hotha rahey
kar kaam karthuthaa naam

Agadam bagadama jeena
kya aathu sathu kaaye ji

hey dar dar ke kyaa jeena
hey jeena ke fir ke ji..
..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who is the lead actor in the movie Aadhi Bhagavan?

The lead actor in the movie is Jayam Ravi.

Who composed the music for the song Agadam Bagadam?

The music was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

What is the mood of the song Agadam Bagadam?

The song has an energetic and upbeat mood.

When was the movie Aadhi Bhagavan released?

The movie was released in the year 2013.

Who wrote the lyrics for the song Agadam Bagadam?

The lyrics were penned by Manoj.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Agadam Bagadam from the movie Aadhi Bhagavan, released in 2013, features Jayam Ravi and Neetu Chandra in lead roles. Composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja and sung by Mohit Chauhan, this energetic dance number captivates listeners with its dynamic beats and vibrant lyrics by Manoj. The song portrays a lively and celebratory mood, making it a perfect choice for parties and festive occasions. Its unique blend of musical elements and engaging performance by the cast leaves a lasting impression on the audience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Agadam Bagadam, a vibrant and energetic track from the movie Aadhi Bhagavan, showcases the musical brilliance of Yuvan Shankar Raja and the captivating vocals of Mohit Chauhan. This song, featuring Jayam Ravi and Neetu Chandra, is a perfect blend of dynamic beats and engaging lyrics by Manoj. Dive into this electrifying number that promises to elevate your spirits and set the dance floor on fire.
